name: pickleball-ratings
description: Display pickleball player ratings using a customizable block.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:php && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:js
scripts.test:setup: WP_TESTS_DIR=/tmp/wordpress-tests-lib WP_CORE_DIR=/tmp/wordpress bin/install-wp-tests.sh wp_test root '' localhost latest
scripts.test: WP_TESTS_DIR=/tmp/wordpress-tests-lib npm run build && WP_TESTS_DIR=/tmp/wordpress-tests-lib vendor/bin/phpunit --testdox
scripts.plugin-zip:production: npm run clean && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && wp-scripts plugin-zip && npm run plugin-zip:add-images && npm run plugin-zip:verify
scripts.plugin-zip:add-images: mkdir -p temp-plugin && unzip pickleball-ratings.zip -d temp-plugin && cp -r images temp-plugin/ && cd temp-plugin && zip -r ../pickleball-ratings.zip . && cd .. && rm -rf temp-plugin
scripts.plugin-zip:verify: unzip -t pickleball-ratings.zip > /dev/null && echo '✅ ZIP file is valid'
